sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: Today was born the blessed Virgin Mary from the seed of David: through whom the salvation of the world has appeared to those who believe.

sections.name: Responsory4
lines: R. Born of royal lineage, Mary shines resplendent:
* We earnestly entreat her to help our minds and souls by her prayers.
V. With all our heart and with all our soul let us sing praise to Christ on this the solemn Feast-day of Mary, the mighty Mother of God, the Virgin Mary.
R. We earnestly entreat her to help our minds and souls by her prayers.

sections.name: Lectio5
lines: @Sancti/09-12:Lectio4:s/She is.*//s

sections.name: Lectio6
lines: @Sancti/09-12:Lectio4:s/.*She is/She is/s

sections.name: Lectio8
lines: @Sancti/09-12:Lectio6:s/{Here .*//s

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. With all our heart and with all our soul let us sing praise to Christ on this the solemn Feast-day of Mary, the mighty Mother of God, the Virgin Mary
* That she may pray for us to the Lord.
V. Let us keep with rejoicing the Birthday of the Blessed Virgin Mary.
R. That she may pray for us to the Lord.

sections.name: Lectio11

sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. Let us this day keep solemnly the Birthday of Mary, Mother of God but still Maiden, her Birth,
* A step toward the loftiness of her throne.
V. Born of a kingly lineage, Mary shines resplendent.
R. A step toward the loftiness of her throne.
